title: About: Our Core Values
description: Five icon tiles for the company's core values.

default.title: Responsibility
default.description: Accountable for every packet sent and every promise made.

default.title: Passion
default.description: Driving innovation through genuine love for technical craftsmanship.

default.title: Customer First
default.description: The final user's experience is our ultimate metric of success.

default.title: Agility
default.description: Fluid structures that allow for rapid pivots in a changing world.

default.title: Family
default.description: A 20-year legacy of kinship and stability in corporate culture.
